choices.text: Associated Token Account (ATA): deterministic PDA per (owner, mint). associated_token::mint + associated_token::authority constraints. Wallet-standard; predictable address.
Create mint with decimals → mint full supply once → token::set_authority(MintTokens, None) renounces mint authority forever. Investors see no rug pull risk. Standard token launch pattern.

questions.explanation: Mint once + renounce mint authority = fixed supply.
